rows.label: tlk45320151_03_msg0001
rows.name:
At this rate, the Superbia
Divine Beast's ether will
soon be exhausted...

rows.label: tlk45320151_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Yet still His Majesty refuses
to take refuge in Gula.

rows.label: tlk45320151_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I understand why, of course. He can't
bring himself to abandon his people,
and he trusts all of you implicitly.

rows.label: tlk45320151_03_msg0004
rows.name: We feel the same way ourselves.
